{{Quote|Azzameens! It is senseless to continue competing with us. Take your business elsewhere while you still have one.|K'Armyn Viraxo's e-mail message to the Azzameens|<ref name="Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''</ref>}}
'''K'Armyn Viraxo''' was an [[K'Armyn Viraxo's species|alien]] [[Gender/Legends|Male]] and the patriarch of the [[Viraxo]] family and head of the shipping conglomerate, [[Viraxo Industries|Viraxo Shipping]] (also known as Viraxo Industries).

His overbearing tactics and habitual use of force and intimidation in business enabled him to carve out a substantial fortune in the shipping sector. He had links with the criminal [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] organization, and was rumored to have even blackmailed an Imperial [[Moff/Legends|Moff]].

During the [[Rebellion era]], K'Armyn Viraxo was involved in an increasingly bitter rivalry with the [[Azzameen family]], who owned [[Twin Suns Transport Services/Legends|Twin Suns Transport Services]], a competitor with the Viraxo. He was implicated in the deaths of [[Tomaas Azzameen/Legends|Tomaas Azzameen]] and [[Galin Azzameen/Legends|Galin Azzameen]], and on several occasions attempted to take the lives of the other members of the Azzameen Family.

During one contest between the two, K'Armyn's pleasure yacht, the ''[[Highroller]]'' was [[Assassination attempt on K'Armyn Viraxo|ambushed]] near [[Destreg II]] by the Azzameen ships ''[[Andrasta]]'' and ''[[Otana/Legends|Otana]]''. Fortunately for him, K'Armyn had been forewarned, and was not aboard when the young outlaws attacked, although his yacht was destroyed.
